output:
Successfully implemented T12: Added 14 runtime creation and publishing tests for structured block-level topic documents in test_topic_editor_runtime.py. All 49 tests (35 existing + 14 new) pass. The broader test suite (145 tests across core, runtime, publishing, and prompts) passes with no regressions.

Tests added:
(a) test_post_sectioned_topic_with_blocks_no_sections_accepted_and_stored
(b) test_structured_topic_stores_blocks_union_sources_and_rows_per_distinct_id
(c) test_archive_resolved_sources_feed_source_authors_and_collision_detection, test_archive_resolved_source_triggers_collision_with_same_author
(d) test_get_message_context_includes_media_refs_available
(e) test_invalid_block_source_id_rejects_with_auditable_transition, test_unresolved_media_ref_message_rejects, test_media_ref_index_out_of_range_rejects, test_media_ref_missing_url_rejects
(f) test_publishing_enabled_sends_structured_blocks_in_order (verifies header→intro text→intro media→section text→section media order)
(g) test_publishing_suppressed_returns_would_publish_sequence, test_publishing_suppressed_includes_no_media_indices_when_no_media
(h) test_simple_topic_publishing_unchanged_with_structured_changes, test_simple_topic_suppressed_still_returns_messages

FakeDB extended with get_topic_editor_source_messages and enriched get_topic_editor_message_context with media_refs_available passthrough.
deviations: Patch tool corrupted the file with escaped backslashes and *** tokens; had to manually fix via Python script before proceeding. This was a tool artifact, not a code issue.
Tests initially assumed extra dict was nested under payload.extra; fixed to access extra keys directly at payload top-level since shape_transition_payload uses payload.update(extra).
Advisory quality: tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py grew by 797 lines (threshold 200).
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC17 is missing an executor acknowledgment.
Advisory audit finding: Tasks left pending after execute (executor never started them): T14

task_updates.executor_notes: Added 14 runtime creation and publishing tests in test_topic_editor_runtime.py covering all requirements (a)-(h). Extended FakeDB with get_topic_editor_source_messages method (resolves against source_message_rows) and enriched get_topic_editor_message_context with media_refs_available passthrough. Added three helper factories (_make_editor_with_source_rows, _make_source_context, _sample_source_message_rows, _sample_context_messages). All 49 tests pass (35 existing + 14 new). Broader suite (145 tests) passes with no regressions. Existing test_render_topic_is_pure_and_handles_simple_sectioned_and_story_update still passes.
watch_items: FakeDB extended with get_topic_editor_source_messages (resolves from self.source_message_rows) and get_topic_editor_message_context now enriches rows with media_refs_available fallback
publish tests verify message send order: intro text -> intro media -> section text -> section media
suppressed mode returns publish_units, flat_messages, and media_indices

sense_checks.question: Does the runtime test verify that publishing enabled sends header -> intro text -> intro media -> section text -> section media in order?
sense_checks.verdict: Yes — test_publishing_enabled_sends_structured_blocks_in_order verifies channel.sent[0] contains header+intro text+[[1]] citation, channel.sent[1] is intro media URL, channel.sent[2] contains section title+text, channel.sent[3] is section media URL. Also verifies discord_message_ids are [9101, 9102, 9103, 9104].

sense_checks.question: Do tests cover both success and rejection paths for blocks with invalid source IDs and invalid media refs?
sense_checks.verdict: Yes — Success paths: test_post_sectioned_topic_with_blocks_no_sections_accepted_and_stored, test_structured_topic_stores_blocks_union_sources_and_rows_per_distinct_id, test_archive_resolved_sources_feed_source_authors_and_collision_detection. Rejection paths: test_invalid_block_source_id_rejects_with_auditable_transition (unresolved source ID), test_unresolved_media_ref_message_rejects (unresolved media ref message), test_media_ref_index_out_of_range_rejects (index out of range), test_media_ref_missing_url_rejects (attachment missing URL).

sense_check_acknowledgments.verdict: Yes — test_publishing_enabled_sends_structured_blocks_in_order verifies channel.sent[0] contains header+intro text+[[1]] citation, channel.sent[1] is intro media URL, channel.sent[2] contains section title+text, channel.sent[3] is section media URL. Also verifies discord_message_ids are [9101, 9102, 9103, 9104].

Yes — Success paths: test_post_sectioned_topic_with_blocks_no_sections_accepted_and_stored, test_structured_topic_stores_blocks_union_sources_and_rows_per_distinct_id, test_archive_resolved_sources_feed_source_authors_and_collision_detection. Rejection paths: test_invalid_block_source_id_rejects_with_auditable_transition (unresolved source ID), test_unresolved_media_ref_message_rejects (unresolved media ref message), test_media_ref_index_out_of_range_rejects (index out of range), test_media_ref_missing_url_rejects (attachment missing URL).
